quotes: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.rule_text: Test contrast levels for every text and background pair to ensure WCAG AA minimums: 4.5:1 ratio for body text, and 3:1 ratio for large text (defined as >=24px or 19px bold).

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.rule_text: Known-safe contrast pairs include Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, or Graphite on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand. Conversely, White may be paired on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy. Avoid Gold or Sunshine text on White due to contrast failure; golds are restricted to surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis.

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; pair color cues with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
